title: Property Consultant - Aliens Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Aliens Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
